entries.title: 9B8T chain assignment wrong
entries.description: Chain A in 9B8T is DNA polymerase epsilon, not PCNA. PCNA = chains B/C/D. All 9B8T outputs are biologically incorrect.
entries.fix_required: Re-run inference on 9B8T with chains B/C/D
entries.notes: Do not cite any 9B8T result until regenerated.

_legacy.title: 9B8T chain assignment wrong
_legacy.description: Chain A in 9B8T is DNA polymerase epsilon, not PCNA. PCNA = chains B/C/D. All 9B8T outputs are biologically incorrect.
_legacy.fix_required: Re-run inference on 9B8T with chains B/C/D
_legacy.notes: Do not cite any 9B8T result until regenerated.

entries.title: Stale ANM outputs with wrong numbers (pre-2026-05-19)
entries.description: Old holo=1.104, delta=+0.247. Correct: holo=1.157, delta=+0.300. Any pre-fix output file is stale.
stale_artifacts: any ANM report or figure before 2026-05-19

entries.title: LIMITATIONS.md line 26 claimed 8GLA absent from all training
entries.description: Wrong: 8GLA IS in PCNA fine-tuning. Absent from held-out CryptoSite eval only.
entries.notes: External shared copies may still carry wrong claim.

entries.title: T6 sanity test fails (chain_id one-hot equivariance)
entries.description: 6/7 model sanity tests pass. T6 fails because chain_id one-hot breaks permutation equivariance.
entries.fix_required: Document as limitation, or remove chain_id feature

_legacy.title: T6 sanity test fails (chain_id one-hot equivariance)
